title: feature
description: Design → Implement → Review → Merge workflow for a new feature

title: Design health-analytics-dashboard
description: Create design document with architecture, data flow, and API contracts

title: Epic 0: Project Bootstrap & Infrastructure
description: Monorepo, Docker Compose, CI/CD. Blocker for all other work.

title: Epic 1: Database Layer & Migrations
description: Alembic migrations, full schema, seed data. Depends on Epic 0.

title: Epic 2: Backend API (FastAPI)
description: Project structure, auth, documents, results, metrics, biomarkers API. Depends on Epic 1.

title: Epic 3: OCR + LLM Document Processing
description: PaddleOCR/DocTR, Ollama LLM parsing, normalization, Celery pipeline. Depends on Epic 0.

title: Epic 4: RAG Recommendation Engine
description: Knowledge base, ChromaDB ingestion, retrieval + recommendation generation.

title: Epic 5: Google Fit Integration
description: OAuth2 PKCE, Google Fitness API sync, Celery scheduled tasks.

title: Epic 6: Frontend (Next.js)
description: UI, dashboard, document upload, trends, settings. Depends on Epic 2.

title: Epic 7: Security & Hardening
description: Encryption, network security, input validation, audit logging.

title: Epic 8: Testing
description: Backend unit tests, API integration tests, frontend Vitest + Playwright E2E.

title: Epic 9: Documentation & Onboarding
description: User docs, dev docs, ADRs, privacy statement.

title: Story 0.1: Repository & Monorepo Setup
description: Init Git monorepo, .gitignore, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODEOWNERS, pre-commit hooks

title: Story 0.2: Docker Compose Orchestration
description: 9 services: postgres, chromadb, redis, ollama, backend, celery_worker, celery_beat, frontend, nginx

title: Story 0.3: CI/CD Pipeline (GitHub Actions)
description: lint.yml, test-backend.yml, test-frontend.yml, build-check.yml, PR template

title: Story 1.1: Alembic Migration Setup
description: Install Alembic, env.py, migrations directory, make migrate/rollback

title: Story 1.2: Full Database Schema
description: 7 tables: users, documents, biomarkers, test_results, health_metrics, recommendations, sync_jobs

title: Story 1.3: Biomarker Seed Data
description: 80+ biomarkers with LOINC codes, unit conversions, idempotent seed script

title: Story 2.1: FastAPI Project Structure & Config
description: App structure, Pydantic settings, SQLAlchemy async engine, middleware, /health

title: Story 2.2: Authentication & Sessions
description: PIN-based auth, JWT, rate limiting, first-run setup

title: Story 2.3: Documents API
description: Upload, list, detail, delete, reprocess, status polling endpoints

title: Story 2.4: Test Results API
description: CRUD, trend, summary, out-of-range endpoints

title: Story 2.5: Health Metrics API
description: Get, post manual entry, delete, summary endpoints

title: Story 2.6: Biomarkers Reference API
description: List with search, detail, categories endpoint

title: Story 2.7: Recommendations API
description: Generate, list, detail, dismiss endpoints

title: Story 2.8: Google OAuth & Sync API
description: Connect, callback, disconnect, status, manual sync trigger

title: Story 3.1: OCR Service Implementation
description: PaddleOCR + DocTR, preprocessing (deskew, contrast, binarization), post-processing (tables)

title: Story 3.2: LLM Parsing Service
description: Ollama integration, system prompt, JSON extraction, retry logic, chunking

title: Story 3.3: Normalization Engine
description: Biomarker matching (exact→fuzzy→LLM), unit conversion, ref range parsing, is_out_of_range

title: Story 3.4: Celery Task: process_document
description: Full pipeline orchestration: OCR→LLM→normalize→insert, error handling, retry policy

title: Story 4.1: Knowledge Base Preparation
description: 15+ medical guideline documents, organize by category, metadata.json

title: Story 4.2: Vector Embedding & ChromaDB Ingestion
description: Ollama embeddings, chunking, ingest script, idempotent, make ingest-rag

title: Story 4.3: RAG Retrieval & Recommendations
description: Retrieve from ChromaDB, generate via Ollama, disclaimer, Celery task

title: Story 5.1: Google OAuth2 Flow
description: PKCE flow, token storage with Fernet encryption, auto-refresh, error handling

title: Story 5.2: Google Fit Data Sync
description: Fetch weight/steps/sleep/HR/active minutes, upsert, Celery Beat schedule

title: Story 6.1: Frontend Project Setup & Design System
description: Next.js 14, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, recharts, react-query, design tokens

title: Story 6.2: Authentication Pages
description: /setup, /login, auth guard middleware, JWT in localStorage

title: Story 6.3: Dashboard Overview
description: MetricsSummaryBar, OutOfRangeAlert, CategoryHealthCards, QuickActions

title: Story 6.4: Document Upload & Management
description: UploadDropzone, ProcessingStatusTracker, DocumentsTable, DocumentDetailModal

title: Story 6.5: Results & Trends
description: ResultsFilterBar, ResultsGrid, BiomarkerTrendChart with reference ranges

title: Story 6.6: Health Metrics Page
description: MetricsOverviewCards, multi-metric chart, manual entry form, GoogleFitSyncPanel

title: Story 6.7: Settings Page
description: General, Privacy, Google Fit, Ollama status, PIN management, About

title: Story 6.8: Responsive Design & Mobile
description: Sidebar→bottom nav, card stacking, horizontal scroll tables, touch-friendly

title: Story 7.1: Encryption at Rest
description: Fernet symmetric encryption, EncryptedString SQLAlchemy type, make generate-key

title: Story 7.2: Network Security
description: Docker network isolation, Nginx security headers, rate limiting

title: Story 7.3: Input Validation & Sanitization
description: Pydantic validation, MIME checking, NaN/Infinity rejection, parameterized SQL

title: Story 7.4: Audit Logging
description: All write ops logged, Google/Ollama API call logging, audit endpoint

title: Story 8.1: Backend Unit Tests
description: normalization, OCR, LLM, RAG, Google Fit, auth tests — target ≥70% coverage

title: Story 8.2: API Integration Tests
description: Full pipeline (mocked), pagination/filtering, duplicate rejection, auth flow

title: Story 8.3: Frontend Tests
description: Vitest unit tests + Playwright E2E: login→upload→view results→trend chart

title: Story 9.1: User Documentation
description: README, SETUP_GOOGLE_FIT, UPLOADING_DOCS, UNDERSTANDING_RESULTS, TROUBLESHOOTING, PRIVACY

description: ADRs, auto-generated API reference, ADDING_BIOMARKERS, ADDING_KNOWLEDGE_BASE

title: Init Git monorepo structure
description: Create directory structure: apps/frontend, apps/backend, infra/docker, infra/nginx, scripts, docs, data

title: Configure .gitignore
description: Exclude: *.env, *.db, pgdata/, chroma_db/, model_cache/

title: Create CONTRIBUTING.md
description: Branch naming: feat/, fix/, chore/, infra/

title: Add CODEOWNERS
description: Map apps/frontend → frontend team, apps/backend → backend team

title: Set up pre-commit hooks
description: ruff (Python), eslint+prettier (JS/TS), hadolint (Dockerfile)

title: Create README.md scaffold
description: Project overview, quick start placeholder

title: Dockerfile: postgres service
description: Image postgres:16-alpine, volume pgdata, health check, internal network

title: Dockerfile: chromadb service
description: Image chromadb/chroma, volume chroma_data, health check /api/v1/heartbeat

title: Dockerfile: redis service
description: Image redis:7-alpine, maxmemory 256mb, allkeys-lru

title: Dockerfile: ollama service
description: ollama/ollama, GPU passthrough optional, pull model on start

title: Dockerfile: backend service
description: Build from apps/backend/Dockerfile, depends on postgres/chromadb/redis/ollama

title: Dockerfile: celery_worker service
description: Same image as backend, entrypoint celery worker

title: Dockerfile: celery_beat service
description: Same image as backend, entrypoint celery beat

title: Dockerfile: frontend service
description: Build from apps/frontend/Dockerfile, proxy network only

title: Dockerfile: nginx reverse proxy
description: nginx:alpine, route /api/* → backend:8000, /* → frontend:3000, port 80 host

title: Create .env.example
description: All required variables with descriptive comments

title: Write Makefile
description: Targets: up, down, logs, shell-backend, shell-db, seed, migrate

title: Create docker-compose.override.yml
description: Hot-reload mounts for local dev

title: Document GPU vs CPU toggle
description: README section on GPU passthrough vs CPU fallback

title: Workflow: lint.yml
description: Runs on every PR: ruff check, eslint, hadolint

title: Workflow: test-backend.yml
description: Runs pytest with --cov ≥ 70% on PR to main

title: Workflow: test-frontend.yml
description: Runs vitest + playwright E2E smoke tests

title: Workflow: build-check.yml
description: Validates docker compose build succeeds

title: Add PR template
description: Checklist: tests added, no secrets, schema migrations included

title: Install Alembic
description: pip install alembic in apps/backend

title: Configure env.py
description: Read DATABASE_URL from environment

title: Create migrations directory
description: migrations/ with versions/ subfolder

title: Write make migrate command
description: alembic upgrade head

title: Write make rollback command
description: alembic downgrade -1

title: Verify idempotent migrate
description: Running make migrate twice is idempotent

title: Create users table
description: UUID PK, created_at, updated_at trigger, display_name, oauth tokens, settings_json JSONB

title: Create documents table
description: UUID PK, user_id FK, upload_date, filename, file_hash UNIQUE, ocr_text, llm_json, status ENUM

title: Create biomarkers table
description: LOINC code UNIQUE, standard_name, display_name, category ENUM, unit, aliases TEXT[]

title: Create test_results table
description: FKs to documents+users+biomarkers, value NUMERIC, raw/standard units, ref ranges, out_of_range BOOL

title: Create health_metrics table
description: user_id FK, date, metric_type ENUM, value, source ENUM, upsert constraint

title: Create recommendations table
description: FKs to users+biomarkers+test_results, rag_context TEXT[], recommendation_text, is_dismissed

title: Create sync_jobs table
description: FK to users, job_type ENUM, celery_task_id, status ENUM, records_synced

title: Add indexes
description: Index on user_id, biomarker_id, result_date, is_out_of_range, and GIN on aliases

title: Add FK cascade deletes
description: ON DELETE CASCADE for user→documents, document→test_results

title: Create updated_at trigger
description: Auto-update timestamp on row modification

title: Add unique constraints
description: Prevent duplicate test_results, health_metrics, and document hashes

title: Create seed_biomarkers.py
description: Bulk-insert script with idempotent ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

title: Seed: Lipid Panel (7)
description: Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides, VLDL, non-HDL, LDL/HDL ratio

title: Seed: Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (18)
description: Glucose, BUN, Creatinine, eGFR, Na, K, Cl, CO2, Ca, Total Protein, Albumin, Globulin, A/G Ratio, Bilirubin, Direct Bilirubin, ALT, AST, ALP

title: Seed: CBC (14)
description: WBC, RBC, Hemoglobin, Hematocrit, MCV, MCH, MCHC, RDW, Platelets, Neutrophils%, Lymphocytes%, Monocytes%, Eosinophils%, Basophils%

title: Seed: Thyroid (6)
description: TSH, Free T3, Free T4, Total T3, Total T4, Anti-TPO

title: Seed: Vitamins & Minerals (10)
description: Vitamin D, B12, Folate, Iron, Ferritin, TIBC, Transferrin Sat%, Magnesium, Zinc, Copper

title: Seed: Hormones (9)
description: Testosterone (Total+Free), Estradiol, Progesterone, DHEA-S, Cortisol, FSH, LH, Prolactin, IGF-1

title: Seed: Inflammation (4)
description: CRP, hs-CRP, ESR, Homocysteine, Fibrinogen

title: Seed: Diabetes (3)
description: HbA1c, Insulin fasting, HOMA-IR

title: Seed: Kidney (3)
description: Uric Acid, Cystatin C, Microalbumin/Creatinine Ratio

title: Create unit_conversions.json
description: mg/dL↔mmol/L factors for cholesterol, glucose, creatinine etc.

title: Add LOINC codes + aliases
description: ≥3 aliases per biomarker, valid LOINC codes verifiable against LOINC DB

title: Add make seed to Makefile
description: Runs seed_biomarkers.py as make target

description: app/api/v1/routes/, core/, models/, schemas/, services/, worker/ directories

description: Allow only http://localhost and http://frontend

description: Include all route modules with prefix

description: /api/v1/docs endpoint for development

title: Implement POST /auth/setup
description: First-run: hash PIN with bcrypt, store in users.settings_json

description: Verify PIN, return JWT HS256 24h expiry

description: Client-side JWT deletion (stateless)

description: Returns is_setup bool, is_authenticated bool

title: Create get_current_user dependency
description: Validates JWT from Authorization header, returns user object

title: Implement JWT with python-jose
description: Signed with ENCRYPTION_KEY, contains user_id+exp

title: Add rate limiting on /auth/login
description: Max 5 attempts/min/IP via Redis

title: First-run detection
description: Redirect to /setup if no users exist

title: Implement POST /documents/upload
description: Multipart file, SHA-256 dedup, enqueue Celery task, return 202

title: Implement GET /documents/
description: Paginated list, sortable, filterable by status/lab/date

title: Implement GET /documents/{id}
description: Full detail including llm_json_payload, test results

title: Implement DELETE /documents/{id}
description: Soft-delete, cascade test_results, remove file

title: Implement POST /documents/{id}/reprocess
description: Re-enqueue OCR+LLM pipeline

title: Implement GET /documents/{id}/status
description: Real-time polling endpoint for Celery task state

title: Add MIME type validation
description: Whitelist PDF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WEBP using python-magic

title: Add file size validation
description: Max UPLOAD_SIZE_MB (default 50MB)

title: Implement GET /results/
description: Paginated, filterable by biomarker/category/date/out_of_range

title: Implement GET /results/trend/{biomarker_id}
description: All historical results sorted by date, correlated health_metrics

title: Implement GET /results/summary
description: Most recent value per biomarker, grouped by category, flags out_of_range

title: Implement GET /results/out-of-range
description: Most recent out-of-range result per biomarker, sorted by severity

title: Implement PATCH /results/{id}
description: Edit notes field only (no mutation of clinical values)

title: Implement DELETE /results/{id}
description: Hard delete specific result for manual correction

title: Implement GET /metrics/
description: Filterable by metric_type and date range, daily aggregated values

title: Implement POST /metrics/
description: Manual entry with upsert on (user_id, date, metric_type)

title: Implement DELETE /metrics/{id}
description: Remove specific entry

title: Implement GET /metrics/summary
description: Per-metric averages/totals for last N days (default 30)

title: Implement GET /biomarkers/
description: Paginated list with search (?q=cholesterol) and category filter

title: Implement GET /biomarkers/{id}
description: Full detail: name, description, unit, normal ranges, loinc_code

title: Implement GET /biomarkers/categories
description: List all categories with counts of user's results per category

title: Implement POST /recommendations/generate
description: Accepts test_result_id, enqueues RAG+LLM task, returns recommendation_id

title: Implement GET /recommendations/
description: All recommendations sorted by date, filterable by biomarker/dismissed

title: Implement GET /recommendations/{id}
description: Full text + RAG context snippets used

title: Implement PATCH /recommendations/{id}/dismiss
description: Sets is_dismissed=true

title: Implement GET /auth/google/connect
description: Returns OAuth2 URL with CSRF state in Redis (5min TTL)

title: Implement GET /auth/google/callback
description: Validate state, exchange code for tokens, encrypt+store, initial sync

title: Implement DELETE /auth/google/disconnect
description: Revoke token, nullify stored tokens, preserve synced data

title: Implement GET /auth/google/status
description: Returns connected bool, token_expiry, last_sync timestamp

title: Implement POST /sync/trigger
description: Manual Google Fit sync trigger

title: Implement GET /sync/jobs
description: Recent sync job history (last 20)

title: Evaluate and install OCR engines
description: PaddleOCR (primary) + DocTR (fallback) with feature flag

title: Implement OCRService.extract()
description: Returns OCRResult with pages, raw_text, bounding_boxes, confidence

title: Implement PDF→image conversion
description: pdf2image at 300 DPI via poppler

title: Implement deskew correction
description: detect + correct rotation via deskew/OpenCV

title: Implement contrast enhancement
description: PIL ImageEnhance.Contrast

title: Implement binarization
description: Otsu thresholding via OpenCV for low-contrast docs

title: Implement table detection
description: Bounding box Y-coordinate clustering, format as markdown ASCII

title: Distinguish text vs scanned PDF
description: pdfminer extracts <50 chars/page avg → treat as scanned

title: Confidence threshold handling
description: Avg confidence < 0.75 → flag status=failed

title: Write unit tests
description: 5 synthetic lab report formats for OCR testing

title: Implement LLMService class
description: httpx async client at OLLAMA_BASE_URL

title: Design system prompt
description: Medical lab report parser, strict JSON output schema

title: Implement JSON extraction
description: json.loads → regex extract → re-prompt (max 2 retries)

title: Implement input chunking
description: If OCR text > 6000 tokens, chunk by page and merge

title: Validate LLM output with Pydantic
description: Schema validation before DB storage

title: Add retry logic
description: 3 retries with exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s), 120s timeout

title: Log LLM metrics
description: Results extracted, null fields, response time

title: Implement biomarker matching
description: Step 1: exact match on aliases → Step 2: fuzzy match (rapidfuzz ≥85) → Step 3: Ollama LOINC lookup → Step 4: LOINC DB lookup

title: Implement unit conversion engine
description: Load unit_conversions.json, bidireactional mg/dL↔mmol/L, round to 4 decimals

title: Implement reference range parsing
description: Patterns: '3.5-5.0', '<5.0', '>40', 'Negative' → low/high/null values

title: Implement is_out_of_range computation
description: Compare value against ref_range_low/high, respect document flags

title: Implement out_of_range_direction
description: Assign high/low/normal/indeterminate

title: Write unit tests
description: 10 unit conversions, 8 ref range patterns, 4 out-of-range scenarios

title: Implement process_document Celery task
description: 10-step pipeline: fetch→OCR→LLM→normalize→insert→complete

title: Implement status transitions
description: pending→ocr_processing→llm_parsing→normalizing→complete, with live status updates

title: Implement error handling
description: Any exception → status=failed, store error, re-raise for Celery retry

title: Celery retry policy
description: Max 2 retries, 30s delay

title: Atomic test_result insertion
description: DB transaction; if any insert fails, rollback all for that document

title: Auto-delete PDF after processing
description: If user settings.auto_delete_pdfs=true

title: Trigger recommendation generation
description: For all out-of-range results after processing
